metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1038
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The paper demonstrates that an abundant signal for catenin delta can be detected in purified PSD fractions from rat brain using WB (Fig 1b).

Figure 3 shows that delta-Catenin interacts with glutamate receptor complexes in brain. A WB signal for delta-Catenin can be found in IP fractions of PSD95, MgluR1alpha and NR2A (3A). The receptors can be detected in a delta-catenin IP sample (3B-D).

21/8/2017 Pim
- Via PMID:9971746 the annotated gene was traced to rat CTNND2 (compared peptide sequences shown in Fig.1 PEPAPPPPPPP and KKKKKKK). Experimental description: For the fractionation of PSD, rat brain homogenates were produced and the crude synaptosomes P2 was isolated as described
